description_long: This is a boxy, utilitarian SUV with a matte black exterior and blue-tinted windows, reminiscent of classic off-road vehicles. The body features sharp, angular lines and a high roof, providing ample interior space. The front end is equipped with a simple grille, round headlights, and a flat hood, while the rear has a prominent spare tire mounted on the back door. The wheels are solid black with a basic, rugged design, suitable for urban and off-road environments. Subtle weathering and scuff marks are visible on the paint, suggesting regular use. The SUV has four side doors and a rear hatch, with side mirrors and minimal decorative elements.
description: A matte black, boxy SUV with blue-tinted windows, rugged wheels, and a rear-mounted spare tire. The design is utilitarian with visible weathering and four side doors.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the spare tire mounted on the back door, blue rear window, and red taillights.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying two blue-tinted windows, two doors, and the spare tire protruding from the rear.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the flat hood, blue windshield, round headlights, and simple grille.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with two blue-tinted windows and two doors visible.
attribute_wheel_design: solid black wheels with a simple, utilitarian design and no visible spokes
